caveat: IMPORTANT: Literature AUROCs were derived from heterogeneous datasets that differ from the Kidney Cell Atlas (Mature_Full_v2.1) used in this study. Differences include: species (mouse vs. human), modality (bulk RNA-seq or clinical biomarker vs. snRNA-seq), injury model (IRI/cisplatin vs. steady-state atlas with maladaptive cell states), and cohort composition. Literature benchmarks serve as directional targets only.
